raw_consumer_statement: I received a purchase from a restaurant, I did not have any purchasing relationship with them, I made the dispute in XX/XX/2023 and Macy 's took 3 months to make the dispute and they continue to charge me for this purchase and the interest, after those 3 months they have no information They closed the claim and today I opened this claim again and they say that I must wait 3 months again, I have never bought anything in this restaurant XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX macys XXXX XXXX XXXX {$280.00}
